description: Style Note This stylish watch from titan, with classic, timeless styling is a must have for every well dressed man. Built with the utmost precision and individuality, each watch has been designed and carefully tested to give you years of reliable service and contemporary style for the man of class! Product DetailsSilver coloured steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfort Dark brown leather strap with a tang clasp White dial with silver hands Titan logo at the 12 hour mark Day and day aperture at the 6 hour mark Screw to reset time Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering or in light rain Size Case diameter: 25.4 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Warranty: 2 Years
